_comment: ERHeadless (bot driver) / client connection configuration. Copy this file to
'erheadless.config.json' next to the ERHeadless executable (or pass
--config <path>). All connection settings come from this file - no env vars.
Every key is optional; omitted keys fall back to localhost:7777 / 3 bots.
The legacy 'ERHeadless.exe <botCount>' positional argument still overrides
